name: APA Corp
summary: APA Corp (CIK: 0001841666) is an oil and gas exploration and production company operating across multiple geographic segments including the United States, Egypt, and the North Sea. The company produces oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGLs). It sells production revenues through customers such as the Egyptian General Petroleum Company and manages commodity contracts across its operating segments.
